name: Dovecote
description: Small cylindrical tower designed to shelter doves (a palomar). Builds a hollow @primary cylinder of radius min(W,D)//2 inscribed in the AABB, a solid @secondary foundation disc at y0, 8-12 nesting holes punched into the upper half of the wall as `minecraft:hay_block` cells (the visible dove-holes), a conical/pointed roof made of stacked stair rings converging to a single @accent block at the apex, an optional flagpole made of a @fence post topped with a `minecraft:bone_block` dove proxy, and a single `minecraft:lantern` hanging inside near the top of the wall section for nighttime visibility.

required_furniture.rule: Hollow @primary cylinder, radius = min(W,D)//2, height = wall section (AABB height minus roof_h = radius+1).
Solid @secondary disc at y0, same radius as the cylinder, forms the footing of the tower.
Replace 8-12 wall cells in the UPPER HALF of the wall with `minecraft:hay_block` to render the dove holes; spread evenly around the rim by angle, and across the available upper rows.
Stacked @stairs rings above the wall, shrinking by 1 in radius per Y-step, each stair faces outward; converge to a single @accent block at the apex.
One @fence post directly above the apex, crowned with a `minecraft:bone_block` as the perched-dove proxy.
One `minecraft:lantern` at the center of the interior near the top of the wall section (just below the roof) for night-time visibility.

placement_rules: Nesting holes in upper half of wall
Foundation disc of @secondary clearly distinguishes the base from the @primary wall
Apex block of @accent + flagpole + bone_block 'dove' crowns the roof
lighting_ventilation: The hay-block nesting holes double as natural ventilation slits in the upper wall, letting doves enter/exit while the conical roof keeps rain off. The interior lantern at the top of the wall keeps light level above hostile-mob threshold (Java 1.16.5) so the dovecote stays mob-safe at night.

medieval.notes: Cobblestone palomar with a stone-brick footing and cap — the canonical farmstead/monastery dovecote.

modern.notes: Smooth-quartz aviary tower on an andesite plinth with an iron flagpole — reads as a contemporary garden folly.

fantasy.notes: Dark-timber wizard's roost on mossy footing with a purpur apex and sea-lantern interior — a witch's familiar coop.

python_skill_signature: pipeline.skills.dovecote.build(aabb: AABB, materials: Materials, style: str, **kwargs) -> list[Op]
